info.title: ALSS-LEPC Adaptive Learning API
info.description: Adaptive Learning System with SAINT KT + vanilla DQN RL

post.description: Create a new adaptive learning session.
Recommend the next concept to study based on mastery and prerequisites.

get.description: Retrieve theory content for the current pending concept.

post.description: Generate an exercise for the current concept at the appropriate Bloom level.
Return the current learning step, creating and persisting one when needed.
Evaluate the user's answer and update BKT mastery estimates.
Chat with an AI tutor about the current exercise, with optional RAG context.

get.description: Return the current status and progress of a learning session.
Return the prerequisite knowledge graph for a session.
Return the concept x Bloom-level mastery matrix for a session.
Return detailed information about a specific concept.
Check if content pipeline runtime modules are available.

post.description: Run the full content processing pipeline from an S3 uploaded file.

get.description:
List recent pipeline jobs of all statuses for the current user.

Returns per-job live fields the frontend library needs: progress, retryable,
eta_seconds, retry_after_seconds, is_terminal, is_delayed.

post.description: Create a learning session from a completed pipeline job.

Request cancellation of a pipeline job.

Works regardless of pipeline runtime availability so a stuck job can always
be cancelled. No-ops when the job has already reached a terminal state.
Retry a terminal, retryable pipeline job by re-fetching its S3 source.
Create a new quiz draft and enqueue AI processing.

get.description: List recent quiz drafts for the authenticated user.
Retrieve a single quiz draft by ID.

patch.description: Update fields of an existing quiz draft.

delete.description: Delete a quiz draft owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Finalize a quiz draft and persist it as a published quiz.
Ask an AI tutor for help understanding a quiz question (stream or single response).

get.description: Aggregate LLM usage/cost over a time window, broken down by action + model.
Kubernetes readiness probe — 503 until all dependencies are up.

has_verified_relation_when_multi_concept.title: Has Verified Relation When Multi Concept

PipelineStatus.title: PipelineStatus
PipelineStatus.description: Authoritative lifecycle states for content pipeline jobs.

s3_key.title: S3 Key
s3_key.description: S3 object key for the source document.

file_name.title: File Name
file_name.description: Original filename of the uploaded document.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Custom AI prompt to guide question generation.

questionImage.title: Questionimage
questionImage.description: Optional image URL/data URL. Accepted only when the configured tutor LLM model supports vision.

optionImages.title: Optionimages
optionImages.description: Optional option image URLs/data URLs. Accepted only when the configured tutor LLM model supports vision.

max_steps.title: Max Steps
max_steps.description: Maximum number of exercise steps in the session.

use_default_data.title: Use Default Data
use_default_data.description: If true, seeds the session with built-in example concepts.

n_concepts.title: N Concepts
n_concepts.description: Number of concepts available in this session.

step.title: Step
step.description: Number of exercises answered so far.

total_concepts.title: Total Concepts
total_concepts.description: Total concepts in the session curriculum.

unlocked_concepts.title: Unlocked Concepts
unlocked_concepts.description: Concepts whose prerequisites are currently satisfied.

locked_concepts.title: Locked Concepts
locked_concepts.description: Concepts still locked by prerequisite mastery.

mastered_concepts.title: Mastered Concepts
mastered_concepts.description: Unlocked concepts at or above the mastery threshold.

avg_mastery.title: Avg Mastery
avg_mastery.description: Average SAINT mastery across unlocked concepts.

progress_percent.title: Progress Percent
progress_percent.description: Percentage of unlocked concepts mastered; locked concepts are excluded.

coverage.title: Coverage
coverage.description: Fraction of concepts that have been visited at least once.

accuracy.title: Accuracy
accuracy.description: Ratio of correct answers to total answered.

StandardResponse_Annotated_Union_MCQExer.title: StandardResponse[Annotated[Union[MCQExerciseResponse, TrueFalseExerciseResponse, FillBlankExerciseResponse, MultiCorrectExerciseResponse, OrderingExerciseResponse, MatchingExerciseResponse, ShortAnswerExerciseResponse], FieldInfo(annotation=NoneType, required=True, discriminator='exercise_type')]]

chatHistory.title: Chathistory
chatHistory.description: Deprecated for adaptive tutor chat. Adaptive chat history is owned by the server session and this field is ignored.

XUserIdHeader.name: x-user-id
XUserIdHeader.description: Authenticated user id forwarded by the frontend proxy.

XServiceTokenHeader.name: x-service-token
XServiceTokenHeader.description: Shared internal token used by the frontend proxy when calling the backend API.

servers.description: Same-origin deployment behind the current API host.
